name: CSS Transitions
performance_characteristics: GPU-accelerated for transform/opacity; compositor-friendly when animating cheap properties
strengths: Baseline-supported in every modern browser for years
Declarative, zero-JS state-change animation (hover, focus, class toggle)
Cheap and smooth when animating transform/opacity on the compositor
weaknesses: Only animates between two states; no keyframe sequencing
Animating layout properties (width, top, height) triggers reflow and jank
No native spring/physics easing; limited to cubic-bezier and steps
